raw_91_c3_honest_disclosure: MKBridge.lean introduces ZERO new sorrys. All 4 outstanding gaps are NAMED AXIOMS (axiom_*), which lean4 surfaces at every kernel check via #print axioms. Structurally stronger than sorry because kernel cannot silently elaborate axioms.

axiom_felgner_1971_conservativity_meta is a `True`-shaped sentinel because lean4 cannot internally name the meta-language Provable predicates of T = ZFC+inacc and T' = MK without a deductive-system formalisation. Full Felgner 1971 mechanisation is W7+ work (~100 pages of original argument).

axiom_strand_zfc_witness is a placeholder for explicit `Strand → ZFSet.{0}` injection via `Encodable Strand`. The constructive derivation is straightforward (`List AminoAcid` / `List RNANucleotide` / `String` all `Encodable`; `Encodable α → α → ZFSet` standard) but ~50 LOC; deferred to W5.
axiom_felgner_bridge_to_MK is the conservativity application: ZFC realisability of StrandClass_ZFC ⇒ IsMKProperClass Strand. Full proof requires formalised conservativity translator (W7+).
axiom_hexa_comp_closure_via_ZFC is a placeholder pending HEXA-COMP definition itself (W6+ AX-3/AX-4 work).

AX2.lean is NOT modified in this commit per W4 mission §safety mandate ('AX2.lean의 메인 PASS 정리 보존'). The 2 sorrys at lines 277/288 remain in place; W5 integration step (with user approval) will rewrite to invoke MKBridge derivations.
Total project actual sorry count: 3 (1 in AX1 tail, 2 in AX2 MK-bridge). MKBridge introduces zero new sorrys.
lake build PASS 10.0s, 954 jobs, on Mac M2 production user; no SIGKILL, no lake update, no new lakefile deps, no toolchain change.
W4 nominal window 2026-06-02 → 2026-06-15; this delivery is on day -35 (early by 5 weeks; running well ahead of schedule with 21d carryover from W3 + 3d additional).
Mathlib4 compatibility honest limit: 4 user-defined axioms not in mathlib4. Downstream review may flag this (F-W4-MK-2). Bundling into single axiom is straightforward refactor.
